description.value: Target takes [[/damage 40 type=negative]] damage. Target makes [[/save type=fortitude]] to reduce. If reduced to 0 HP by this weave, target is disintegrated (turned to dust). Only resurrection magic can restore them.

system.effect: Target takes 40 negative damage. Target makes Fortitude save to reduce. If reduced to 0 HP by this weave, target is disintegrated (turned to dust). Only resurrection magic can restore them.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails, 1 = Half damage (20), 2 = Full damage (40), 3 = Enhanced damage (48)
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
